projects.name: Darla
projects.description: Need tabbed command center with stakeholder map, timeline confidence, and evidence explainability

contexts.text: Need tabbed command center with stakeholder map, timeline confidence, and evidence explainability

Environment:
- 8x H100 nodes
- Mellanox switches
- VLAN 210 configured

Deployment Status:
- Rack and stack complete
- Firmware updated to BIOS 2.4.3
- Kubernetes cluster initialized

Issues:
- Node 3 GPU not detected
- Error in nvidia-smi

Resolution:
- Reseated PCIe cable
- GPU detected after reboot

Next Steps:
- Run burn-in testing
- Validate NCCL performance
